name: Red Sockeye Salmon Special
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove any remaining skin and bones from the salmon, even if it's canned.
2. Mix the flaked salmon (canned or fresh) with lemon juice, finely diced onion, and chopped dill.
3. Blend in mayonnaise and whipping cream until well combined.
4. Cover and chill.
Makes about 1 1/2 cups of dip.
Suggested Dippers: Broccoli, Cauliflower, Cucumber, Black Bread, Potato Skins.
